case_title: BERNAL, JEROME J. vs. SHAFER, JOSEPH JR.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS & COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERNAL, JEROME J. SERVED MAR-06-1995, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHAFER, JOSEPH JR.

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, CALENDAR OF APR-17-1995 AMENDED MINUTE ORDER. APRIL 17, 1995 ORDER IS RESCINDED. THE MATTER SHOULD HAVE BEEN TAKEN OFF CALENDAR IN VIEW OF APRIL 7, 1995 STIPULATION BETWEEN THE PARTIES.
MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT SHAFER, JOSEPH JR. HEARING SET FOR MAR-20-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT SHAFER, JOSEPH JR. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT SHAFER, JOSEPH JR. HEARING SET FOR APR-17-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERNAL, JEROME J. AS TO DEFENDANT SHAFER, JOSEPH JR. SUMMONS ISSUED
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS, CALENDAR OF MAR-20-1995, DENIED 5 DAYS TO PLEAD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERNAL, JEROME J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAFER, JOSEPH JR. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 389-A SAN JOSE AVE, LEASE FORFEITED, STIPULATED- SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
